description_long: This is a low-profile, rectangular wooden cabinet with a minimalist design, featuring a rich walnut finish. The front side displays two large horizontal drawers with recessed black handles, and a single open compartment or door on the left side. The cabinet stands on short, sturdy legs that slightly elevate it above the ground, providing stability and a modern aesthetic. The top surface is flat and expansive, suitable for placing decorative items, electronics, or other objects. The overall construction appears solid, with clean lines and a smooth, matte finish. No glass panels or visible interior contents are present.
description: A modern, walnut-finished wooden cabinet with two drawers, black recessed handles, and a flat top surface. Its minimalist design and sturdy legs make it suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open compartment or door on the left and a large black panel, with the rest of the cabinet's wood finish visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's narrow depth and solid wood construction, with no visible handles or compartments.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view displaying two large drawers with black recessed handles and the full width of the cabinet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's narrow profile and wood grain.
